scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:e2e
scripts.verify:builder: npm run test -- builderUiNavigation && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:builder
scripts.verify:journey: npm run test -- playerJourneyIntegration && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:journey
scripts.verify:content: npm run test -- contentIntegrityAudit && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:content
scripts.verify:catalog: npm run test -- contentIntegrityAudit contentCompletionPolicy && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:content
scripts.verify:class-runtime: npm run test -- classSpecificRuntimePolicy && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:class-runtime
scripts.verify:character-creation: npm run test -- fullCharacterCreationJourney && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:character-creation
scripts.verify:advancement: npm run test -- levelOneToTwentyJourney levelUpAdvancementReadiness && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:advancement
scripts.verify:combat-runtime: npm run test -- combatAutomationRuntime combatTurnRules combatStatusRules && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:combat-runtime
scripts.verify:inventory: npm run test -- inventoryEconomyRuntime itemUseRules equipmentClosureRuntime && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:inventory
scripts.verify:data-safety: npm run test -- backupSafetyRuntime fullBackup backupImport characterBackup safeStorage characterHydration && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:data-safety
scripts.verify:mobile-quality: npm run test -- mobileAccessibilityPerformance NumberStepper builderUiNavigation && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:mobile-quality
scripts.verify:technical-debt: npm run audit:technical-debt && npm run lint && npm run test -- inventoryEconomyRuntime backupSafetyRuntime combatAutomationRuntime mobileAccessibilityPerformance && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:stability
